description: QA testing and security audit infrastructure - Integration tests, security tests, performance benchmarks, audit scripts, static analysis config
steps: Add ENABLE_INTEGRATION_TESTS and ENABLE_BENCHMARKS CMake options (default OFF) in root CMakeLists.txt. When enabled, add_subdirectory the respective test dirs.
Create tests/integration/ directory with CMakeLists.txt that builds integration test executable.
Create tests/integration/test_main.cpp with doctest main.
Create tests/integration/test_scan_pipeline.cpp: End-to-end scan test - create temp test files with known content, run ScanEngine scan, verify detection results via FileHasher and SignatureMatcher.

Create tests/integration/test_edr_pipeline.cpp: EDR event pipeline test - start FileMonitor watching a temp dir, create/modify/delete files, poll for events, verify events captured with correct types.
Create tests/integration/test_firewall_rules.cpp: Rule evaluation end-to-end - create RuleEngine, add rules with various match criteria, evaluate packets against rules, verify allow/block decisions.
Create tests/integration/test_database_lifecycle.cpp: Full DB lifecycle - create database, run migration, insert records via QueryBuilder, query them back, verify integrity.
Create tests/security/ directory with CMakeLists.txt.
Create tests/security/test_main.cpp with doctest main.

Create tests/security/test_crypto_operations.cpp: Verify SHA256 against NIST test vectors (already tested but add more vectors), test CryptoUtils encrypt/decrypt roundtrip, test key generation produces unique keys.

Create tests/security/test_input_validation.cpp: Fuzzing-style tests - extremely long strings, null bytes in strings, path traversal attempts (../../etc/passwd), SQL injection patterns in query builder inputs, buffer boundary values.
Create tests/security/test_authentication.cpp: Auth bypass attempts - test RBAC with invalid roles, expired tokens, tampered tokens, session fixation scenarios, privilege escalation attempts.
Create tests/security/test_secure_storage.cpp: Verify encrypted data differs from plaintext, verify key material is not stored in cleartext strings (basic check), verify decrypt(encrypt(x)) == x.
Create tests/performance/ directory with CMakeLists.txt.
Create tests/performance/bench_main.cpp with doctest main.
Create tests/performance/bench_scanner.cpp: File scanning throughput benchmark - create N temp files, measure time to hash all of them, report files/sec.
Create tests/performance/bench_hash.cpp: Hashing performance - benchmark SHA256 on 1KB, 1MB, 100MB buffers, report MB/sec.
Create tests/performance/bench_rule_matching.cpp: Firewall rule matching performance - create 10000 rules, evaluate 100000 packets, measure evaluations/sec.
Create .clang-tidy at project root with security-relevant checks: bugprone-*, cert-*, cppcoreguidelines-*, performance-*, readability-identifier-naming.
Create .cppcheck-suppressions at project root with common suppressions (missingIncludeSystem, unmatchedSuppression).
Create scripts/run_security_audit.sh: Runs cppcheck (if available) and clang-tidy (if available) on src/, then runs security tests.
Create scripts/run_integration_tests.sh: Builds with ENABLE_INTEGRATION_TESTS=ON and runs the integration test suite.
Create scripts/run_memory_check.sh: Builds with ENABLE_SANITIZERS=ON and runs tests under AddressSanitizer.
Update tests/CMakeLists.txt or root CMakeLists.txt to conditionally add integration and benchmark subdirectories.
Ensure default build (all options OFF) still compiles and all 1053 existing tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF && cmake --build build succeeds (default, no new tests compiled)
Integration tests compile and run (at least test_scan_pipeline and test_edr_pipeline pass)
All scripts are executable with correct shebangs
verification: rm -rf build && cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF -DENABLE_INTEGRATION_TESTS=ON -DENABLE_BENCHMARKS=ON && cmake --build build -j$(nproc)
